potential_hidden_parents.name: reasoning.timescale_separation
potential_hidden_parents.rationale: Both separate dynamics into fast and slow components. Adiabatic: parameter changes slowly vs period; small parameter: nonlinear terms are slow vs linear oscillation. Could unify under a common parent.

potential_hidden_parents.name: reasoning.independent_mode_decomposition
potential_hidden_parents.rationale: Both find a coordinate system where dynamics decouple into independent 1D problems. Normal modes: eigenvalue diagonalization. H-J separation: PDE splitting. Similar structure, different context.

potential_hidden_parents.name: reasoning.action_extremization
potential_hidden_parents.rationale: Homogeneity scaling can be derived without action, but action provides the unifying framework. Weak parent candidate.

missing_edges: parametric_resonance → adiabatic_invariance: both concern time-dependent parameters, but parametric is fast variation, adiabatic is slow. Complementary views of the same underlying Floquet/slow manifold mathematics.
normal_modes → small_parameter_expansion: the reverse edge should exist — normal mode theory is what justifies the quadratic expansion being sufficient.
rumination_1_notes.graph_quality: Good initial topology. The reasoning tree is deep (variational → symmetry → conservation → effective reduction → Kepler). Cross-links (analogy edges) are sparse but correctly identified. The main gap is the timescale_separation hidden parent — extracting this would make the graph significantly more useful for plasma physics applications.

key_analogies: multipole_expansion ↔ small_parameter_expansion (scale separation in radiation vs mechanics)
lorentz_invariance ↔ symmetry_to_conservation (Vol.2 T1 vs Vol.1 T2 — both are symmetry→physics chains)
EM energy-momentum tensor ↔ mechanical energy conservation (field theory generalization of Noether)

potential_new_hidden_parents.name: reasoning.scale_separation_universal
potential_new_hidden_parents.rationale: All three separate dynamics by a small parameter: a/λ (radiation), amplitude/equilibrium (oscillations), dλ/dt·T (adiabatic). Could unify as 'small parameter → simplified description'.

potential_new_hidden_parents.name: reasoning.symmetry_constrains_lagrangian
potential_new_hidden_parents.rationale: Both use symmetry to constrain physical law. Lorentz constrains the FORM of L; Noether constrains the CONSEQUENCES of L. Two sides of the same coin.

key_cross_connections: adiabatic_invariance ↔ landau_damping (both involve slow/fast timescale separation)
parametric_instability ↔ landau_damping (instability thresholds vs damping thresholds)
Maxwell → plasma dielectric (field equations + Vlasov → ε(k,ω))
Liénard-Wiechert ↔ moving_media (point charge radiation ↔ medium electrodynamics)

key_connections: mechanics.energy → continuum_limit (conservation laws in field form)
Navier-Stokes ↔ kinetic_closure (fluid stress ↔ Boltzmann collision integral)
